snippet_sections.content: Use the revised plan pipeline: bind inputs, generate packet, emit request artifacts, validate, then output structured plan sections.
Emphasize schema validation: request.instance.json -> request.schema.json, contract.bindings.json -> contract_bindings.schema.json; surface status and required artifacts.
List evidence per artifact row in the matrix: include files, references, status, user commands that produced them, and inference tags.
